sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76920" key="palindi/nhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλιν-δίνητος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n76920.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whirling round and round</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θάλασσα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.73</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>); <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κόσμοιο παλινδίνητον ἀνάγκην</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0118.tlg001:1:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.19</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Claudian.</author> </bibl>), cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4057.tlg001:9:505:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.505.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
